mapper.select: select count(*) from (SELECT data_label FROM t_data_info WHERE FIND_IN_SET( ( SELECT label_id FROM t_label_info WHERE label_id = #{labelId} AND label_type = 0 ), data_label ) UNION SELECT data_label FROM t_problem_info WHERE FIND_IN_SET( ( SELECT label_id FROM t_label_info WHERE label_id = #{labelId} AND label_type = 0 ), data_label ) )dataLabel
